main.description: Check whether a user (and optionally a client application) should be authorized to access a space. Served by the space's managingApp rather than the PDS; called by the space authority with service auth at credential mint time when the space's policy is managing-app.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the user requesting access.

clientId.description: The attested client_id of the requesting application, if a client attestation was presented.

reason.description: Optional application-defined explanation for the decision.
